title: cola bruneelii
intro: Cola bruneelii, also known as the Ivory Coast Cola, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Sterculiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion. Cola bruneelii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tea, tinctures, and infusions, which are traditionally used in West African medicine to treat various ailments.
